title: UMU Backpack
description: A modern and simple backpack MOD! You can even carry your pet on the backpack!
body:
![Title Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zemelua/UMU-Backpack/main/material/title.png)

# What is this?
UMU Backpack is a simple mod that adds a backpack and some enchantments.

# About backpack
To craft a backpack, you'll need 4 leathers, 2 rabbit leathers, and 1 gold ingot and 1 shulker shell.

![Backpack Recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Zemelua/UMU-Backpack/main/material/recipe.png)

Backpacks can also be dyed by crafting them with dyes.

You can open the inventory by pressing the B key while equipped with a backpack. Also, if there are items in the backpack, you will not be able to remove the backpack.

# Enchantments
### Cram
A regular backpack inventory only has 9 slots, but with the cram enchantment it grows up to 54 slots.

### Back Protection
Reduces damage taken from behind when a player is equipped with a backpack with this enchantment. The maximum level is 4, which does not compete with other resistant enchantments.

### Load
Instead of not being able to open the backpack inventory, small animals, such as chickens or cats, can be transported in the backpack.
